reviews.review_description: for a free game this is actually pretty good and it's really good if you wanna test your aim and stuff.

reviews.review_title: Sad excuse for a VR Gun Range
reviews.review_description: The graphics are low quality, the guns and bullets are all low poly, the 'AI' NPC's just walked set paths, you have no inventory or holster, you have no mag pouch, and I could go on for a while here, but I hope you get my point. I see that this is an Early Access title, but I refuse to believe this app legitimately got this many high reviews while there are FAR better free gun range apps. I hope to see improvement in the future, but I feel upset by what looks to me like someone paying for reviews to get their app out there.
For free, this is a great simple range game.
Pretty good

This isn't the worst shooting experience I've ever had but it's not a good time either. I can see some. Potential here but some series things need to change before I could find this to be enjoyable. For one, having no holster to place a weapon is absurd. One gun and one clip without a belt to store it on is a big miss. The gun handling is slightly off. The pitch needs lowered significantly. The bolt action is very hard to reload. The npcs don't shoot back, I can't go up stairs. No jump or vault feature. This is very bare bones and does not appear to have any polish. I'll update this review if things progress in a positive way but I'm not sure this will be worth anyone's time in the long run.i think the high rating for this game is due to the free items given to players who review the game. If you have to give incentive for good reviews it means you know your product is sub par.

reviews.review_title: Immitation of Inti The Radius guns
reviews.review_description:
I have no idea why this game is rated 4.7, the gun handling is pretty bad. I only tried the pistol and your hands lag behind in game, so if you try to switch targets quickly you miss, the eject magazine button is in the wrong place because you copied the mechanics from into the radius.
Eject magazine should be on the Y/B button cause it’s the button closes to the button on the gun, and the safety/release slide should be on the X/A button. Use a gun replica for reference, when ejecting the magazine you use the tip of your thumb, when operating the slide you use the middle. If you’re going to make a gun simulator, don’t just copy another game.
Use hand tracking combined with controllers, so that you can use both hands when using a pistol and operate the slides/magazines with your non controller hand.
Know this game is the best game im just doing this to get the grenade

Are there no instructions how you use the application? Can it not be use with ACE handset pistols? 

The graphics are good, just no instructions how to access the weapons,  load ..etc!
God

I found this game maybe a couple weeks ago, and it's my go to for when I am bored. The game has amazing physics, which is one of the reasons why I enjoy it so much. I am hoping that the game stays free as it is an amazing project. I recommend the game to some of my VR owning friends but they did not want to take a look at it. I think that this is an amazing game and the devs should continue working on it. 

Here are some things that I think the game is missing: Weapon variety and a pouch of sorts to store ammunition on the range.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! Our team is very happy to hear that you are enjoying our game! We are currently working on some new updates, so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: I like the game because it's really fun 😁
Good game
It is a good game but we need pistols
How the HELL did the picture show a shotgun with a scope, I tried putting a scope on it, and it didn't work.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! The weapon in the trailer is actually a bolt-action sniper rifle, not a shotgun, which is why it has a scope. We’ll work on making that clearer. Hope you’re enjoying the game!

I just got this game cause it was free and I 
looked fun and it is messing around with the guns in the range is fun I do hope this game gets and up date and adds more attachments and a way to store your guns and ammo on your person but I do think this game has alot of potential
its a good game but i would like it more if you could have custom mag, and ncps that shoot back

reviews.review_description: This game honestly has miles of potential. The gun mechanics are crazy, the level of detail put into them and the things you can do is wild. I can see the creator of the game put a lot of thought into this game as everything about the guns are cool, the way you can reload them, you can even smack the magazine out of a gun to reload. Even some triple A vr games don't have that
